{{CargoOrgan
|name=Permafrost Duopupil
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10662
|idx=19
|description=The left eye freezes flesh, the right petrifies souls. Victims' essence becomes eternal sculptures in the ice hell's gallery.
|skill=Awaken the power of frost, dealing DMG equal to 163% of ATK!
|hp=1376
|def=206
|atk=128
|rush=159
|gene1=In Mutant Form, Water DMG +120
|gene2=In Mutant Form, {race} ATK +40
|gene3=In Mutant Form, {race} RUSH +40
|gene4=In Mutant Form, ignore enemy DEF +2%
|gene7=In Mutant Form, ignore enemy DEF +2% (Awakened)
|}}
